mapper.select: SELECT planner_id, name AS planner_name, planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY name ASC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.planner_id, c.name, c.mobile, p.name AS planner_name, p.planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER c JOIN TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p ON c.planner_id = p.planner_id WHERE c.planner_id IN #{item} AND c.is_active = true AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER WHERE planner_id IN #{item} AND is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT template_id, title, content_text, image_url, category FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE WHERE is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY template_id DESC
SELECT template_id, title, content_text, image_url, category FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_NTALK_SEND_QUEUE (customer_id, planner_id, template_id, message_text, image_url, send_type, scheduled_at, status, created_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{i.customerId}, #{i.plannerId}, #{i.templateId}, #{i.messageText}, #{i.imageUrl}, #{i.sendType}, #{i.scheduledAt}, 'PENDING', #{i.createdId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
